Frequently Asked Questions

What is UI-Verse?

UI-Verse is a collection of reusable and modern UI components built using HTML and CSS.

Is this component responsive?

Yes, the FAQ section is fully responsive and adapts to different screen sizes.

Can I use this component in my projects?

Absolutely. You can reuse and customize the component for personal or professional projects.

Does this component use JavaScript?

No. This FAQ section is built completely using HTML and CSS.
